messages.content: I can answer questions, open apps or websites, generate images, play music, write content, and assist with various tasks, Moksh. I'll do my best to help you with any information or action you need.
what is the current net worth of Elon
Elon Musk's current net worth is estimated to be around $744 billion, primarily stemming from his ownership of Tesla and SpaceX, with his wealth fluctuating based on the market value of his assets.

According to Forbes, Elon Musk's current net worth is estimated to be around $839 billion, making him the richest person in the world, with his wealth primarily coming from his ownership of Tesla and SpaceX, as well as other ventures such as X, formerly known as Twitter.
